lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa aap vasai man soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Lord Himself comes to dwell in the mind. ||1||Pause||
but the Guru's system is profound and unequalled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai darasan mukat gat hoe |
lines.english: The Guru's system is the way to liberation.
if it is embraced with love and affection.
Through the Guru's system, the world is saved,
How rare is that person who truly loves the Guru's Way.
Serving the True Guru, one's family is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai darasan sadaa sukh hoe |2|
lines.english: Through the Guru's system, everlasting peace is obtained. ||2||
Through the Guru's system, the Door of Salvation is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਰੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sukh saant sareer |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the body finds peace and tranquility.
There is no salvation for those who have no Guru.
Beguiled by worthless sins, they are struck down. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh taa kau lagai na peer |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is not afflicted by pain.
The Messenger of Death does not come near him.
O Nanak, the Gurmukh is absorbed in the True Lord. ||4||1||40||
Aasaa, Third Mehl:
One who dies in the Word of the Shabad, eradicates his self-conceit from within.
He serves the True Guru, with no iota of self-interest.
The True Bani of the Word is obtained only by good destiny. ||1||
So gather merits, and let your demerits depart from within you.
The Fearless Lord, the Great Giver, ever abides in his mind.
He chants the Ambrosial Nectar of the Word, and the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad samaeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall be absorbed into the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਾ ਕਾ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਗੁਣ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: gunaa kaa gaahak hovai so gun jaanai |
lines.english: One who purchases merits, knows the value of these merits.
Through merit, the Name is obtained. ||2||
The invaluable merits cannot be acquired.
The pure mind is absorbed into the True Word of the Shabad.
Through the True Bani of the Word, he becomes pure.
How very fortunate are those who meditate on the Naam,
and ever enshrine in their minds the Lord, the Giver of merit. ||3||
He Himself spontaneously bestows His gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo gun sangrahai tina balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who gather merits.
At the Gate of Truth, I sing the Glorious Praises of the True One.
Great is the greatness of the True Guru;
O Nanak, the value of the Lord cannot be described. ||4||2||41||
Aasaa, Third Mehl:
He merges in His Merger, those who have been separated for so long.
He Himself knows His own worth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਿਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kee keemat kin bidh hoe |
lines.english: How can anyone appraise the Lord's worth?
He Himself merges the merged in His Merger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har aparanpar agam agochar gur kai sabad milai jan koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one may merge with the Infinite, Unapproachable and Incomprehensible Lord. ||1||Pause||
The Gurmukh chants the Word of the Shabad. ||2||
Through the Sublime Bani of His Word, one becomes sublime.
Few are the Gurmukhs who know His worth.
How rare are those who receive the Lord's Grace.
but when one meets the True Guru, then that pain is removed.
Without meeting the Guru, the mortal earns only pain.
Without the Name, the body suffers in pain;
The self-willed manmukh receives only more punishment. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਅਤਿ ਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam meetthaa at ras hoe |
lines.english: The essence of the Lord's Name is so very sweet;
he alone drinks it, whom the Lord causes to drink it.
O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, salvation is attained. ||4||3||42||
Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te har ras paae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the essence of the Lord is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਮ ਸਦ ਲਾਗਹ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin kai ham sad laagah paae |1|
lines.english: I fall at their feet forever and ever. ||1||
Through the Word of the Shabad, His humble servants easily swim across.
My God is True, deep and profound.
Serving Him, the body acquires peace and tranquility.
